name: Hexagon
description: Hexagon is a global leader in digital reality solutions, combining sensor, software and autonomous technologies. Through the Nexus platform and product APIs, Hexagon delivers manufacturing intelligence capabilities spanning metrology, quality inspection, production monitoring, and digital factory solutions.

itemListElement.name: Hexagon Nexus API
itemListElement.description: REST APIs for the Nexus digital reality platform enabling manufacturers to build connected workflows integrating metrology, quality inspection, and production monitoring data. Authenticated via OAuth 2.0.

itemListElement.name: HxGN EAM REST API
itemListElement.description: Enterprise Asset Management REST API providing programmatic access to asset lifecycle data including equipment management, work orders, preventive maintenance, document attachments, and service requests.

itemListElement.name: HxGN SDx API Services
itemListElement.description: Smart Digital eXchange API Services enabling integration with Hexagon's engineering data management platform for plant design, document control, and digital twin workflows.
